testcase.name: Test Scenarios for Swag Labs @SwagLabsTestSuite › [@AddItemsAndCheckout]TC001 - Add Items to Cart and Checkout
testcase.system-out: Client: SwagLabs, Env: QC, User: standard_user, URL: https://www.saucedemo.com/ Logged in successfully [ [33m29.99[39m ] Added Sauce Labs Backpack to cart Clicked back to products [ [33m29.99[39m, [33m9.99[39m ] Added Sauce Labs Bike Light to cart Clicked back to products Verified shopping cart badge count is equal to number of Products Added to Cart Clicked on shopping cart Verified Products added to cart are visible in shopping cart User has checked out successfully Verified total price is correct
